caption: The video consists of a static white background featuring a single line of black text centered in the upper half of the frame. The text reads "Social Psych: indirect examination of 'neuroscience'". Throughout the sequence, there is no movement, no people, and no changes to the setting or content. The scene remains completely unchanging across the frames, maintaining the same text in the same position against the plain white backdrop. No other objects, logos, or visual elements are present.
